objective: Managing silent resource overloads and multi-process memory consumption in a 512MB RAM Docker environment.

completed: Verified active subprocesses structure and confirmed only a single shared browser instance is active.
Implemented automatic browser recycling after 15 contexts are created to clean memory fragmentation.
Wired browser recycling into the periodic and manual Garbage Collection tasks.
Rebuilt and restarted the Docker containers using docker compose up -d --build to verify startup.
Verified all 19 unit/integration and 43 core tests pass cleanly after modifications.

decisions_locked: Recycle shared Chromium browser process when idle to reclaim virtual and resident memory.
Recommend lowering Node old space size to 256MB on 512MB RAM hosts.
acceptance_criteria: Automatic recycling clears standard Playwright subprocesses when idle.
Application boots safely inside the docker environment.
practical_recommendations: Check container metrics using docker exec and getResourceMetrics API.
completed_items: GC idle browser shutdown logic in resourceMonitor.ts
